items.summary: Move the Real, Hourly, and Year mode buttons along with their corresponding time display from the bottom-right floating panel (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) into the Sun Effects section inside the World Controls panel (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]). The buttons and time display must be rendered as a cohesive sub-section within Sun Effects, preserving all existing functionality (mode switching, time display updates).
Remove the bottom-right floating panel (XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) from the DOM entirely after its contents have been relocated to the Sun Effects section.
Preserve the existing UI layout and 3D globe unchanged. All other controls, panels, and the globe rendering must remain exactly as they are before this change.
